name: rendara-backend
description: Rendara - FIRS-compliant e-invoicing and bookkeeping platform API

scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const p=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}); p.query(fs.readFileSync('migrations/001_initial.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('Migration complete');process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
